subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon God! That which was written became clear and manifest, a sweet fragrance wafting from its rose-garden of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله آنچه مرقوم بود مفهوم و معلوم گشت نفحه خوشی از گلزار معانیش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
